article_title: Serilog Enrichers：给每条日志自动注入上下文
core_theme: Serilog Enrichers 在日志管线中自动为每条日志附加机器名、线程 ID、关联 ID 等属性——配置一次，全局生效
reader_takeaway: 学会用标准 Enricher、LogContext 动态属性和自定义 Enricher 让每条日志自动携带诊断所需的上下文
summary_angle: 把「配置 Enricher → 日志管线自动注入属性 → 每条日志自带上下文」的流水线做成封面

information_blocks.visual_idea: 日志管线入口，三个属性标签（机器名、线程ID、关联ID）被自动贴到经过的日志事件上

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 LogContext.PushProperty 作用域机制
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个 using 代码块包裹着日志事件，块内的事件都带着 PaymentId、CustomerId 等动态属性

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文自定义 Enricher 实现 ILogEventEnricher
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个自定义齿轮模块插入管线，输出带 TenantId 的日志事件

main_metaphor: 一条日志流水线：原始日志进入 → 经过多个 Enricher 工作站 → 输出携带完整上下文的日志
primary_subject: 一条从左到右的日志处理管线，入口是裸日志事件，经过标注了 Enricher 的工作站后被注入属性
subject_action: 日志事件沿管线移动，每个工作站给它贴上不同的上下文标签
composition: 斜向推进或从左到右的流水线构图
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: American cartoon illustration, elastic shapes, clear expressions, bold color fields, light comedic timing
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从 40 项风格池随机选中（#21）；教程流水线概念的步骤感适合用卡通的清晰分割和弹性造型表达
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 第一轮先验证流水线构图是否清晰：日志从左到右经过三个标注的 Enricher 工作站
revision_targets: 卡通风格是否过度幼稚
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: Serilog Enrichers automatically inject properties like machine name, thread ID, and correlation IDs into every log event in the pipeline. Configure once, applies globally. LogContext adds dynamic per-request properties. Custom enrichers extend the pipeline. The reader should feel: a log event enters the pipeline bare and exits carrying all diagnostic context.

Summary angle: A log event assembly line: raw logs enter → pass through multiple Enricher workstations → exit with full context attached.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-4 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- Step: Standard enrichers (WithMachineName, WithThreadId, WithCorrelationId) automatically tag passing log events. Label: 自动注入.
- Mechanism: LogContext.PushProperty scopes wrap log events with dynamic properties like PaymentId, CustomerId. Label: LogContext.
- Step: Custom enricher implementing ILogEventEnricher plugs into the pipeline, outputting logs with TenantId. Label: 自定义.

Main metaphor: A log processing assembly line: bare log events enter, pass through labeled Enricher workstations, exit carrying complete context.
Subject: A left-to-right pipeline where bare log events move through annotated Enricher workstation modules, each attaching a different context tag.
Composition/framing: Left-to-right pipeline or slight diagonal flow. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: American cartoon illustration, elastic shapes, clear expressions, bold color fields, light comedic timing. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: warm orange, deep blue, bright white, soft grey.
Visible text policy: allow only 1-3 short Chinese labels, all sourced from the information blocks. Each label <= 6 Chinese characters. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: code rain, generic robots, fake UI, fake terminal, fake architecture labels.
